title: AMAUTE IN LA THAK A SA UH HI

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Vantung inn sungah i lawmte'n lasa hi
Hong gum Topa a min a phatna uh hi
Leitungah lungkhamna teng mangngilh khin a
Mi siangthote'n lungdamna la thak a sa

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Sihna zo a hing kik ta hi

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Hong hehpihna phat na'ng la thak om kim hi
A um ta ding thuphabel a hi ding hi
Topa si a a piang kik a minthanna
Ka gennasa nuambel hi Pasian kiangah

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Tuni sipha tawh a kisil lote in
tua la thak kuamah in sa thei lo ding hi
Mawhnei te mawhna phel a hong hehpihna
Phatna lungdamin limtakin la sa ni
